taxonomy: Simocheilus purpureus is a species of freshwater crayfish in the family Gocheilidae. It is endemic to the United States. The classification of Simocheilus purpureus includes the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, class Malacostraca, and order Decapoda. This species belongs to the family Gocheilidae, which is a small family of crayfish. Further classification includes the genus Simocheilus, with S. purpureus being the only known species within this genus.
